category_sources: Official homepage describes webfs as a simple HTTP server for mostly static content.
source_facts.description says webfs is an HTTP server for purely static content.
display_name_sources: Official homepage section title is About webfs.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface and includes description, download, features, and design notes.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository was identified from the official homepage; source_facts.source-archive points to an official release tarball, which is not a repository URL.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists static file serving, limited CGI support, optional SSL support, virtual hosts, and IPv6.
source_facts.description supports HTTP static content serving.
